examples: He has sent hither swarms of officers to harass our people.
We've got a few small Green Peace boats that we harass the dumping ship with.
He will bring up your past to haunt and harass you.
I've moved house and I still cannot go out because people approach me and harass me.
Critics say it was a questionable use of racketeering law, an election-year ploy to harass DeLay.
